title: Chancellor's Service Medal

The '''Chancellor's Service Medal''' was a prestigious medal awarded by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for impressive feats in war. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Elin Garza]] received the Chancellor's Service Medal for her actions during the [[Great Galactic War]] against the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Sith Empire]]. [[Time/Legends|Millennia]] later, during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Fordo|ARC-77]]—nicknamed Fordo—received the medal for his role in the [[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Battle of Hypori]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. However, Fordo refused the honor, instead having the Chancellor's Service Medal posthumously awarded to [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[CT-43/002]], who had [[Death/Legends|died]] in the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]] of that same [[Standard year/Legends|year]].

==Description==
The Chancellor's Service Medal was a prestigious medal given out by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for extraordinary exploits and service in war.<ref name="gg" /><ref name="Bio" /> The Chancellor's Service Medal could be refused, transferred, or posthumously awarded.<ref name="gg" />

==Recipients==
===ARC-77===
{{Main|Fordo}}
[[File:FordoHelmetshot.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Captain ARC-77 "Fordo"]]
One of the many [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]],<ref name="clone troopers">{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}}</ref> [[Fordo|ARC-77]], nicknamed Fordo, was an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] and [[Clone Captain/Legends|clone captain]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="gg" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> during the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], Fordo led an elite [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] called [[The Muunilinst 10]]<ref name="gg" /> behind enemy lines to destroy a Confederate [[Harnaidan defensive cannon|artillery emplacement]]. Although The [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] 10 was successful,<ref name="cw3">{{CW|3}}</ref> and the Republic victorious,<ref name="cw9">{{CW|9}}</ref> one of Fordo's squadmates, [[CT-43/002]], was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in battle.<ref name="gg" />

Right after the battle,<ref name="TNEC" /> Fordo and The Muunilinst 10 were sent to the Confederate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] to rescue a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that had been stranded there during the [[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Battle of Hypori]]. During the rescue operation, Fordo and his squad had to fight off Confederate [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], a deadly [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] trained in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]]. Although The Muunilinst 10 took several casualties, Fordo and his men managed to rescue three Jedi and escape Hypori.<ref name="cw21">{{CW|21}}</ref> For his actions and leadership at Hypori, Fordo was awarded the Chancellor's Service Medal. However, Fordo refused the prestigious honor, instead transferring the award posthumously to CT-43/002.<ref name="gg" /> Following Hypori, Fordo continued to serve in the Grand Army, and he participated in the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|defense]] of the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when it was invaded by the Confederacy<ref name="cw25">{{CW|25}}</ref> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC" />

===CT-43/002===
{{Main|CT-43/002}}
[[File:CT-43.png|thumb|left|150px|CT-43/002]]
Another clone Jango Fett,<ref name="clone troopers" /> CT-43/002 was a clone trooper in the Grand Army of the Republic during the Clone Wars and a member of the elite squad known as The Muunilinst 10, under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Fordo.<ref name="gg" /> In 22 BBY,<ref name="TNEC" /> CT-43/002 and The Muunilinst 10 were dispatched to the Confederate world of Muunilinst to take out an enemy [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] emplacement during the Battle of Muunilinst. However, the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] carrying The Muunilinst 10 was hit by a Confederate [[Missile/Legends|missile]] as it approached the artillery emplacement, forcing the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] to crash-land behind enemy lines. Soon after The Muunilinst 10 landed, the squad was ambushed by Confederate [[battle droid assassin]]s, and CT-43/002 was cut down by enemy [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Laser/Legends|fire]].<ref name="cw3" /> Later that year,<ref name="TNEC" /> Fordo received the Chancellor's Service Medal for his exploits at the Battle of Hypori. However, Fordo rejected the medal, instead transferring his Chancellor's Service Medal posthumously to CT-43/002 for his sacrifice at Muunilinst.<ref name="gg" />

===Elin Garza===
{{Main|Elin Garza}}
[[File:GeneralGarza-TOR.png|thumb|right|150px|General Elin Garza]]
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from Coruscant, Elin Garza served as a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]] during the [[Great Galactic War]] against the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Sith Empire]]. Garza was a tactical genius and performed with distinction in the war, helping with the foundation of the Republic's [[Republic Special Forces Division|Special Forces division]]. However, despite Garza's efforts,<ref name="Bio" /> the Republic lost the war following the [[Sacking of Coruscant]] and the [[Treaty of Coruscant]]<ref name="Timeline 1">{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 1: Treaty of Coruscant|int=Timeline 1: Treaty of Coruscant}}</ref> in [[3653 BBY]],<ref name="YearMathTC">{{YearMathTC}}</ref> with an uneasy peace forming between the Republic and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Empire afterward.<ref name="Timeline 1" /> For her deeds during her career, Garza was given the Chancellor's Service Medal, as well as several other awards and citations.<ref name="Bio" /> In the resulting [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] after the Treaty of Coruscant,<ref name="Timeline 1" /> General Garza became a controversial [[Politics/Legends|political]] figure,<ref name="Bio" /> developing into a rival of Republic [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Dorian Janarus]].<ref name="Janarus">{{HolonetOld|biographies|supreme-chancellor-janarus|Supreme Chancellor Janarus}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Chancellor's Service Medal was first mentioned in the reference article ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'', written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], and released in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] in [[2005]].<ref name="gg" /> In ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], Chancellor [[Leontyne Saresh]] will award the Chancellor's Service Medal to players at the end of the Trooper storyline if they killed General [[Arkos Rakton]], but if he is captured alive, the player will be awarded the [[Cross of Glory]] instead.<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
